'''âk-k-g''' ('''kakaga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:backdrive|backdrive]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-k-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:backdrive|backdrive]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-k-g
|-
! Lemma
| kakaga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kakagithi|kakagithi]] || [[word:kakagiji|kakagiji]] || [[word:kakagishi|kakagishi]] || [[word:kakagi|kakagi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kakaguthuth|kakaguthuth]] || [[word:kakagujuj|kakagujuj]] || [[word:kakagushush|kakagushush]] || [[word:kakag|kakag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kakaguthu|kakaguthu]] || [[word:kakaguju|kakaguju]] || [[word:kakagushu|kakagushu]] || [[word:kakagu|kakagu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kakagufuth|kakagufuth]] || [[word:kakagufuj|kakagufuj]] || [[word:kakagufush|kakagufush]] || [[word:kakaguf|kakaguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kakagethe|kakagethe]] || [[word:kakageje|kakageje]] || [[word:kakageshe|kakageshe]] || [[word:kakage|kakage]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kakagothoth|kakagothoth]] || [[word:kakagojoj|kakagojoj]] || [[word:kakagoshosh|kakagoshosh]] || [[word:kakag|kakag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kakagotho|kakagotho]] || [[word:kakagojo|kakagojo]] || [[word:kakagosho|kakagosho]] || [[word:kakago|kakago]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kakagofoth|kakagofoth]] || [[word:kakagofoj|kakagofoj]] || [[word:kakagofosh|kakagofosh]] || [[word:kakagof|kakagof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kakagĂŠthĂŠ|kakagĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:kakagĂŠjĂŠ|kakagĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:kakagĂŠshĂŠ|kakagĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:kakagĂŠ|kakagĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kakagathath|kakagathath]] || [[word:kakagajaj|kakagajaj]] || [[word:kakagashash|kakagashash]] || [[word:kakag|kakag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kakagatha|kakagatha]] || [[word:kakagaja|kakagaja]] || [[word:kakagasha|kakagasha]] || [[word:kakaga|kakaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kakagafath|kakagafath]] || [[word:kakagafaj|kakagafaj]] || [[word:kakagafash|kakagafash]] || [[word:kakagaf|kakagaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:kakagasha|kakagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gokakagasha|gokakagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokikakagasha|gokikakagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:kakagnĂŒsha|kakagnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokakagnknĂŒsha|gokakagnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokikakagnĂŒsha|gokikakagnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kakagshĂ«sha|kakagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokakagnkshĂ«sha|gokakagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikakagshĂ«sha|gokikakagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kakagrosha|kakagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokakagnkrosha|gokakagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikakagrosha|gokikakagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kakagmusha|kakagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokakagnkmusha|gokakagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikakagmusha|gokikakagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:kakagsherasha|kakagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokakagnksherasha|gokakagnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokikakagsherasha|gokikakagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:kakagngasha|kakagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokakagnkngasha|gokakagnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokikakagngasha|gokikakagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kakagyasha|kakagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokakagnkyasha|gokakagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokikakagyasha|gokikakagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:kakagyamasha|kakagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokakagnkyamasha|gokakagnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokikakagyamasha|gokikakagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:kakagnĂŒshĂ«sha|kakagnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokakagnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gokakagnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikakagnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokikakagnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kakagnĂŒrosha|kakagnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokakagnknĂŒrosha|gokakagnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikakagnĂŒrosha|gokikakagnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kakagnĂŒmusha|kakagnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokakagnknĂŒmusha|gokakagnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikakagnĂŒmusha|gokikakagnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:kakagshĂ«nĂŒsha|kakagshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokakagnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokakagnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikakagshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokikakagshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kakagshĂ«rosha|kakagshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokakagnkshĂ«rosha|gokakagnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikakagshĂ«rosha|gokikakagshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kakagshĂ«musha|kakagshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokakagnkshĂ«musha|gokakagnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikakagshĂ«musha|gokikakagshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:kakagronĂŒsha|kakagronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokakagnkronĂŒsha|gokakagnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikakagronĂŒsha|gokikakagronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:kakagroshĂ«sha|kakagroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokakagnkroshĂ«sha|gokakagnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikakagroshĂ«sha|gokikakagroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kakagromusha|kakagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokakagnkromusha|gokakagnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikakagromusha|gokikakagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:kakagmunĂŒsha|kakagmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokakagnkmunĂŒsha|gokakagnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikakagmunĂŒsha|gokikakagmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:kakagmushĂ«sha|kakagmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokakagnkmushĂ«sha|gokakagnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikakagmushĂ«sha|gokikakagmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kakagmurosha|kakagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokakagnkmurosha|gokakagnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikakagmurosha|gokikakagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:kakag|kakag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kĂŠkĂŠg|kĂŠkĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hokakag|hokakag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hokĂŠkĂŠg|hokĂŠkĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokakag|hohokakag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokĂŠkĂŠg|hohokĂŠkĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒkakag|nĂŒkakag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒkĂŠkĂŠg|nĂŒkĂŠkĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒkakag|nĂŒnĂŒkakag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒkĂŠkĂŠg|nĂŒnĂŒkĂŠkĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻkakag|nĂŻkakag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻkĂŠkĂŠg|nĂŻkĂŠkĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻkakag|nĂŻnĂŻkakag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻkĂŠkĂŠg|nĂŻnĂŻkĂŠkĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lukakag|lukakag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lukĂŠkĂŠg|lukĂŠkĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukakag|lulukakag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukĂŠkĂŠg|lulukĂŠkĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:likakag|likakag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:likĂŠkĂŠg|likĂŠkĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikakag|lilikakag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikĂŠkĂŠg|lilikĂŠkĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kokakag|kokakag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kokĂŠkĂŠg|kokĂŠkĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokakag|kokokakag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokĂŠkĂŠg|kokokĂŠkĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kekakag|kekakag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kekĂŠkĂŠg|kekĂŠkĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekakag|kekekakag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekĂŠkĂŠg|kekekĂŠkĂŠg]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
